name: Osama bin Laden
role: Founder and Emir of al-Qaeda; mastermind of the 9/11 attacks
quote: America is full of fear from its north to its south, from its west to its east. Thank God for that.

name: Khalid Sheikh Mohammed
role: Al-Qaeda Head of External Operations; principal architect of the 9/11 attacks
quote: I was responsible for the 9/11 operation from A to Z.

name: Mohammed Atta
role: 9/11 lead hijacker; pilot of AA Flight 11 (North Tower); operational coordinator for all four hijacking teams
quote: The time of fun and waste has gone. The time of judgment has arrived.

name: President George W. Bush
role: 43rd President of the United States; launched the War on Terror, Operation Enduring Freedom, and the Iraq War in response to 9/11
quote: Whether we bring our enemies to justice, or bring justice to our enemies, justice will be done.

name: Vice President Dick Cheney
role: U.S. Vice President; managed crisis response from the White House PEOC on 9/11; key architect of enhanced interrogation and surveillance programs
quote: We also have to work through, sort of, the dark side, if you will... use any means at our disposal.

name: George Tenet
role: Director of Central Intelligence (1997–2004); reportedly warned the White House about bin Laden threat in 2001; 'slam dunk' WMD intelligence
quote: The system was blinking red. And so we did move very quickly in the spring of 2001.

name: Condoleezza Rice
role: National Security Advisor (2001–2005); testified before 9/11 Commission; later served as Secretary of State
quote: I believe the title was 'Bin Laden Determined to Attack Inside the United States.' ... It did not warn of attacks inside the United States.

name: Richard Clarke
role: National Coordinator for Security, Infrastructure Protection, and Counter-terrorism (1998–2003); testified before 9/11 Commission; publicly apologized to victims' families
quote: Your government failed you. Those entrusted with protecting you failed you. And I failed you.

name: Rudy Giuliani
role: Mayor of New York City on 9/11; led city's emergency response and public communication; became 'America's Mayor'
quote: Tomorrow New York is going to be here. And we're going to rebuild, and we're going to be stronger than we were before.

name: Thomas Kean
role: Chair of the 9/11 Commission; former Republican Governor of New Jersey; led the bipartisan investigation that produced the definitive account of the attacks
quote: We believe that the 9/11 attacks revealed four kinds of failures: in imagination, policy, capabilities, and management.

name: Lee Hamilton
role: Vice Chair of the 9/11 Commission; former Democratic Representative from Indiana; co-directed the investigation with Thomas Kean
quote: We need to find ways to make America safer. The enemy is adaptive — if we close one door, they will find another.

name: Betty Ong
role: American Airlines Flight 11 flight attendant; called American Airlines ground control for 27 minutes during the hijacking, providing the first detailed report of the attacks in progress
quote: Our number-one is not breathing. Our purser is stabbed... the cockpit is not answering their phone.

name: Todd Beamer
role: Passenger on United Airlines Flight 93; credited with organizing passenger revolt; became iconic for reported final words 'Let's roll'
quote: Are you guys ready? Let's roll.

name: Prime Minister Tony Blair
role: British Prime Minister; closest international ally in the War on Terror; committed UK forces to Afghanistan and Iraq alongside the United States
quote: This is not a battle between the United States of America and terrorism, but between the free and democratic world and terrorism.

name: John Farmer
role: Senior Counsel to the 9/11 Commission; later Dean of Rutgers Law School; wrote 'The Ground Truth' about the gap between official accounts and actual events on 9/11
quote: At some level of the government, at some point in time, there was an agreement not to tell the truth about what happened.
